sources.text: I noticed a charge on my account for XXXX dollars that I did not authorize. I called the bank three times and filed a dispute. It has been over sixty days and they still have not returned my money. Every time I call I get a different answer and no one will tell me the status of my dispute.

My account was frozen without any warning on XXXX. I have direct deposit of my paycheck into this account and now I cannot pay my rent. The bank says I need to verify my identity but they keep rejecting the documents I send. I have no access to my own money and it has been two weeks.

I sent a transfer to my daughter on XXXX and it took four business days to arrive instead of the one day the app promised. The money did arrive. I am just annoyed that the timeline was not accurate and the app kept saying pending.

I have been trying to get a loan modification on my mortgage for eight months. The servicer lost my paperwork twice. Now I have received a notice that they are starting foreclosure even though I was told my application was under review. I am about to lose my home.

I called customer service FOUR TIMES and every single representative was rude and unhelpful. I waited on hold for over an hour each time. I just wanted to update my mailing address. This is the WORST service I have ever experienced.

Someone tried to use my card at a store in XXXX but the bank caught it and blocked the charge. They sent me a new card. I was not charged anything. I am writing because I want to make sure my account is secure now.
I was charged a XXXX dollar late fee on my credit card even though I paid a day before the due date according to my records. I would like the fee reversed. Otherwise the card has been fine.
I could not log into the mobile app for two days last week. It kept saying error. I reset my password and now it works. Posting this so you know the app had issues.

I wired XXXX dollars to close on a house and the money never arrived at the title company. The bank confirmed the wire left my account but cannot tell me where it went. It has been nine days and I am at risk of losing the house because the closing funds are missing.
XXXX XXXX XXXX. I am not happy. Please fix. Thank you XXXX.
